bead.title: web-ui: graph elements remain visible in dark mode
bead.description: Edges and arrowheads styled with border-line/dark-border-line tokens are ~1.1:1 contrast in dark mode. Introduce graph-local CSS vars (--graph-edge, --graph-edge-arrow) at #766F65 (light) / #9C9486 (dark). Drop the 0.6 stroke-opacity multiplier (use color, not alpha, for subtlety). Coordinate with Story 1 (which retunes the token) and Story 3 (layout) — preserve commit history per merge policy.
bead.acceptance: 1. New CSS vars --graph-edge, --graph-edge-arrow defined for both themes. 2. stroke-opacity multiplier removed; stroke color carries subtlety. 3. Playwright dark-mode test: alpha-blending contrast helper (NOT token-string equality) asserts >=3:1. 4. Test fixture renders all three staleness states (fresh/stale/missing) for color assertions. 5. cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e -- graph passes.
